productDisplayName: Timex Men Charcoal Grey Dial Watch T49796
description: Article number: T49796Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, has a fixed bezel with markings and a stainless steel backDial style: Charcoal grey dial with steel toned and white markings, steel toned hands with cut-out detail and yellow accents, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the time, date aperture on the 3 hour mark, two chronograph displays, buttons on the sidesStrap style: Yellow, synthetic strap, secured with a tang clasp and a loopWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
